violations.text: Utensils in the storage area are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Inspector observed leaf litter and trash buildup outside the back door. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The ( ) in the ( ) area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The presence of rats outside is not controlled as evidenced by numerous burrows observed in the median strip along the drive thru. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the cup dispenser and nitro refrigerator have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

The floors and walls throughout the service area and storeroom has an accumulation of residue and debris. The outside area near back door and dumpster have litter around the area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
